scripts.build: mkdir -p build && circom src/transaction.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -l lib -l node_modules -o build
scripts.prove: snarkjs groth16 fullprove build/input.json build/transaction_js/transaction.wasm keys/transaction.zkey build/proof.json build/public.json
scripts.verify: snarkjs groth16 verify keys/verification_key.json build/public.json build/proof.json
